{{Infobox character
| name = Yushi
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Herald, Thunder Fairy, Reigan Shen's right hand
| abilities = Thunder Fairy Path
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Yushi Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Yushi is a [[Herald]] who follows the lightning [[Path]] and is recognized as one of [[Reigan Shen]]'s closest associates. Though she is frequently referred to by the nickname [[Thunder Fairy]]—a title she dislikes and which has inspired children's rhymes—she possesses a delicate appearance, characterized by long brown hair and a spark located on her forehead. Despite this fragile look, she is a powerful combatant capable of flight via crackling lightning wings and utilizing specialized techniques. During battle, she has demonstrated the ability to target opponents with lethal precision. Yushi's death resulted in the formation of a beautiful, inhuman [[Remnant]] that resembled a [[diamond]] with lacy wings and lightning effects. In terms of political service, she was designated to serve a [[Sage]] for a one-year term as part of a diplomatic arrangement involving [[House Arelius]].}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yushi]] is a [[Herald]] on a lightning [[Path]] known as the [[Thunder Fairy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yushi]] is known as the [[Thunder Fairy]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|As the [[Thunder Fairy]] and right hand to [[Reigan Shen]], Yushi is a [[Herald]] distinguished by a spark on the center of her forehead and wings that crackle with lightning. During her interactions with [[Yerin]], she is noted for having a pleasant and melodious laugh. While participating in battle, the intense pressure of the conflict made her feel as though she were facing a [[Monarch]]. She also possesses a [[diamond]]-like [[Remnant]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yushi]] is the [[Thunder Fairy]] and [[Reigan Shen]]'s right hand.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yushi]] is a [[Herald]] with wings made of lightning.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yushi]] has a spark on the center of her forehead.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yushi]]'s laugh is pleasant and melodious.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yushi]] is a character [[Yerin]] interacts with.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yushi]]'s wings crackle with lightning.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yushi]] is fighting in a battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yushi]] felt as though she was facing a [[Monarch]] due to the pressure.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yushi]] has a [[diamond]]-like [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Deal hasn’t changed,” Yerin said to Yushi.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
